summary: PR #60 is approved for the docs-only Library capability catalog fields contract and remains within App #58/#54 scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-06-30 coordinator review approved PR #60 docs-only contract at product head b7a1c44e42eb476433ad89ac0aac8dd1946049c7; prior branch validation covered `git diff --check`, JSON syntax, Loom fact-chain, suite validate, and carrier validate; no UI/code, App shell, catalog store, package schema, registry, installer, marketplace, hosted registry, external writes, or issue closeout changed.
follow_ups: Do not treat this approval as UI/code, App shell, catalog store, installer, marketplace, hosted registry, real package registry, fixture execution, post-check execution, merge, or issue closeout completion.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: ADR 0005 defines App Library as a display projection over Lode/Core/Harbor facts, limits local persistence to non-sensitive UI state/cache, and preserves unknown/redacted/unavailable/metadata_missing/invalid_contract distinctions.
